name: dynamo-vllm
_comment_c_serving: 2 µs/seq — DSv4-Pro on gb200/dynamo-vllm regresses at 0 µs (29.8% MAE → 33.2%) so 2 µs is a better fit for this stack. vLLM's per-seq Python paths are heavier than SGLang's even under Dynamo, so c_serving doesn't fully zero out. Distinct from raw vllm (20 µs) because Dynamo absorbs the bulk of the bookkeeping; only the irreducible Python sampling glue leaks through. See decode.md §7.2 for the per-stack ranges.
